name: EthicaDistiller
description: Recursive learning pipeline — reads saved chat logs, re-runs semantic analysis, consolidates into memory. Ethica grows richer with every distillation run.
author: Victory

tools.name: distill_run
tools.description: Process all unprocessed chat logs. Extract patterns, update memory. Ethica learns.

tools.name: distill_status
tools.description: Show distillation history and files waiting to be processed.
